  <div
    class="search-input-container search-with-dialog position-relative d-flex flex-row flex-items-center tmp-mr-4 rounded"
    data-action="click:qbsearch-input#searchInputContainerClicked"
  >
      <button
        type="button"
        class="header-search-button placeholder  input-button form-control d-flex flex-1 flex-self-stretch flex-items-center no-wrap width-full py-0 pl-2 pr-0 text-left border-0 box-shadow-none"
        data-target="qbsearch-input.inputButton"
        aria-label="Search or jump to…"
        aria-haspopup="dialog"
        placeholder="Search or jump to..."
        data-hotkey=s,/
        autocapitalize="off"
        data-analytics-event="{&quot;location&quot;:&quot;navbar&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;searchbar&quot;,&quot;context&quot;:&quot;global&quot;,&quot;tag&quot;:&quot;input&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;searchbar_input_global_navbar&quot;}"
        data-action="click:qbsearch-input#handleExpand"
      >

          <div data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesModalDialogFlash"></div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="custom_scope_name">Name</label>
            <auto-check src="/search/custom_scopes/check_name" required>
              <input
                type="text"
                name="custom_scope_name"
                id="custom_scope_name"
                data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesNameField"
                class="form-control"
                autocomplete="off"
                placeholder="github-ruby"
                required
                maxlength="50">
              <input type="hidden" data-csrf="true" value="pFajHGR5i8dy5fMyUv5aKwVNQdiBZ7EbOsjyf3PfLAkw4DN5qn7m8OYvexzKHzs7mdek3maXJ2Zk0dqCl/U/RA==" />
            </auto-check>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="custom_scope_query">Query</label>
            <input
              type="text"
              name="custom_scope_query"
              id="custom_scope_query"
              data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesQueryField"
              class="form-control"
              autocomplete="off"
              placeholder="(repo:mona/a OR repo:mona/b) AND lang:python"
              required
              maxlength="500">
          </div>

          <p class="text-small color-fg-muted">
            To see all available qualifiers, see our <a class="Link--inTextBlock" href="https://docs.github.com/search-github/github-code-search/understanding-github-code-search-syntax">documentation</a>.

</form>        </div>

        </div>

</div>

</button>

</button>
</div>
</dialog></dialog-helper>

dir=\"auto\"\u003eChangelog\u003c/h1\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-changelog\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Changelog\" href=\"#changelog\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003ev1.15.0 — April 7, 2026\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-v1150--april-7-2026\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: v1.15.0 — April 7, 2026\" href=\"#v1150--april-7-2026\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThis release delivers two critical security patches targeting header injection and SSRF via proxy bypass, adds official runtime support for Deno and Bun, and includes significant CI security hardening.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🔒 Security Fixes\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--security-fixes\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🔒 Security Fixes\" href=\"#-security-fixes\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eHeader Injection (CRLF):\u003c/strong\u003e Rejects any header value containing \u003ccode\u003e\\r\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003e\\n\u003c/code\u003e characters to block CRLF injection chains that could be used to exfiltrate cloud metadata (IMDS). Behavior change: headers with CR/LF now throw \u003ccode\u003e\"Invalid character in header content\"\u003c/code\u003e. (\u003cstrong\u003e#10660\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSSRF via \u003ccode\u003eno_proxy\u003c/code\u003e Bypass:\u003c/strong\u003e Introduces a \u003ccode\u003eshouldBypassProxy\u003c/code\u003e helper that normalises hostnames (strips trailing dots, handles bracketed IPv6) before evaluating \u003ccode\u003eno_proxy\u003c/code\u003e/\u003ccode\u003eNO_PROXY\u003c/code\u003e rules, closing a gap that could cause loopback or internal hosts to be inadvertently proxied. (\u003cstrong\u003e#10661\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🚀 New Features\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--new-features\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🚀 New Features\" href=\"#-new-features\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDeno \u0026amp; Bun Runtime Support:\u003c/strong\u003e Added full smoke test suites for Deno and Bun, with CI workflows that run both runtimes before any release is cut. (\u003cstrong\u003e#10652\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🐛 Bug Fixes\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--bug-fixes\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🐛 Bug Fixes\" href=\"#-bug-fixes\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eNode.js v22 Compatibility:\u003c/strong\u003e Replaced deprecated \u003ccode\u003eurl.parse()\u003c/code\u003e calls with the WHATWG \u003ccode\u003eURL\u003c/code\u003e/\u003ccode\u003eURLSearchParams\u003c/code\u003e API across examples, sandbox, and tests, eliminating \u003ccode\u003eDEP0169\u003c/code\u003e deprecation warnings on Node.js v22+. (\u003cstrong\u003e#10625\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🔧 Maintenance \u0026amp; Chores\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--maintenance--chores\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🔧 Maintenance \u0026amp; Chores\" href=\"#-maintenance--chores\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eCI Security Hardening:\u003c/strong\u003e Added \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor\"\u003ezizmor\u003c/a\u003e GitHub Actions security scanner; switched npm publish to OIDC Trusted Publishing (removing the long-lived \u003ccode\u003eNODE_AUTH_TOKEN\u003c/code\u003e); pinned all action references to full commit SHAs; narrowed workflow permissions to least privilege; gated the publish step behind a dedicated \u003ccode\u003enpm-publish\u003c/code\u003e environment; and blocked the sponsor-block workflow from running on forks. (\u003cstrong\u003e#10618\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10619\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10627\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10637\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10641\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10666\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDocs:\u003c/strong\u003e Clarified HTTP/2 support and the unsupported \u003ccode\u003ehttpVersion\u003c/code\u003e option; added documentation for header case preservation; improved the \u003ccode\u003ebeforeRedirect\u003c/code\u003e example to prevent accidental credential leakage. (\u003cstrong\u003e#10644\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10654\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10624\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDependencies:\u003c/strong\u003e Bumped \u003ccode\u003epicomatch\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ehandlebars\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eserialize-javascript\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003evite\u003c/code\u003e (×3), \u003ccode\u003edenoland/setup-deno\u003c/code\u003e, and 4 additional dev dependencies to latest versions. (\u003cstrong\u003e#10564\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10565\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10567\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10568\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10572\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10574\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10663\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10664\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10665\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10669\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10670\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🌟 New Contributors\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--new-contributors\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🌟 New Contributors\" href=\"#-new-contributors\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eWe are thrilled to welcome our new contributors. Thank you for helping improve axios:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e@Kilros0817\u003c/strong\u003e (\u003cstrong\u003e#10625\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e@shaanmajid\u003c/strong\u003e (\u003cstrong\u003e#10616\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10617\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10618\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10619\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10637\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10641\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10666\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e@ashstrc\u003c/strong\u003e (\u003cstrong\u003e#10624\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#10644\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e@Abhi3975\u003c/strong\u003e (\u003cstrong\u003e#10589\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e@raashish1601\u003c/strong\u003e (\u003cstrong\u003e#10573\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/axios/axios/compare/v1.14.0...v1.15.0\"\u003eFull 2026\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-v1140--march-27-2026\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: v1.14.0 — March 27, 2026\" href=\"#v1140--march-27-2026\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThis release fixes a security vulnerability in the \u003ccode\u003eformidable\u003c/code\u003e dependency, resolves a CommonJS compatibility regression, hardens proxy and HTTP/2 handling, and modernises the build and test toolchain.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🔒 Security Fixes\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--security-fixes-1\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🔒 Security Fixes\" href=\"#-security-fixes-1\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFormidable Vulnerability:\u003c/strong\u003e Upgraded \u003ccode\u003eformidable\u003c/code\u003e from v2 to v3 to address a reported arbitrary-file vulnerability. Updated test server and assertions to align with the v3 API. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7533\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🐛 Bug Fixes\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--bug-fixes-1\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🐛 Bug Fixes\" href=\"#-bug-fixes-1\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eCommonJS Compatibility:\u003c/strong\u003e Restored \u003ccode\u003erequire('axios')\u003c/code\u003e in Node.js by correcting the \u003ccode\u003emain\u003c/code\u003e field in \u003ccode\u003epackage.json\u003c/code\u003e to point to the built CJS bundle. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7532\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFetch Adapter:\u003c/strong\u003e Cancel the \u003ccode\u003eReadableStream\u003c/code\u003e body after the request stream capability probe to prevent resource leaks. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7515\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eProxy:\u003c/strong\u003e Upgraded \u003ccode\u003eproxy-from-env\u003c/code\u003e to v2 and switched to the named \u003ccode\u003egetProxyForUrl\u003c/code\u003e export, fixing proxy detection from environment variables and resolving CJS bundling errors. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7499\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eHTTP/2:\u003c/strong\u003e Close detached HTTP/2 sessions on timeout to free resources when no new requests arrive. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7457\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eHeaders:\u003c/strong\u003e Trim trailing CRLF characters from normalised header values. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7456\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🔧 Maintenance \u0026amp; Chores\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--maintenance--chores-1\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🔧 Maintenance \u0026amp; Chores\" href=\"#-maintenance--chores-1\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eToolchain Modernisation:\u003c/strong\u003e Migrated test suite to Vitest, updated ESLint to v10, upgraded Rollup and \u003ccode\u003e@rollup/plugin-babel\u003c/code\u003e, migrated to Husky 9, upgraded TypeScript to latest, and modernised the Express test harness. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7484\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7489\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7498\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7505\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7506\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7507\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7508\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7509\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7510\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7516\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7522\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDependencies:\u003c/strong\u003e Bumped \u003ccode\u003emulter\u003c/code\u003e to v2, \u003ccode\u003eminimatch\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003etar\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003epacote\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e@babel/preset-env\u003c/code\u003e, and additional dev dependencies. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7453\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7480\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7491\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7504\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7517\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7531\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🌟 New Contributors\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--new-contributors-1\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🌟 New Contributors\" href=\"#-new-contributors-1\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eWe are thrilled to welcome our new contributors. Thank you for helping improve axios:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e@penkzhou\u003c/strong\u003e (\u003cstrong\u003e#7515\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e@aviu16\u003c/strong\u003e (\u003cstrong\u003e#7456\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e@fedotov\u003c/strong\u003e (\u003cstrong\u003e#7457\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/axios/axios/compare/v1.13.6...v1.14.0\"\u003eFull Changelog\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003ev1.13.6 — February 27, 2026\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-v1136--february-27-2026\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: v1.13.6 — February 27, 2026\" href=\"#v1136--february-27-2026\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThis release adds React Native Blob support, fixes several enumeration and export regressions, and patches FormData detection for WeChat Mini Program environments.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🚀 New Features\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--new-features-1\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🚀 New Features\" href=\"#-new-features-1\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eReact Native Blob Support:\u003c/strong\u003e Axios now correctly handles native Blob objects in React Native environments. (\u003cstrong\u003e#5764\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🐛 Bug Fixes\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--bug-fixes-2\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🐛 Bug Fixes\" href=\"#-bug-fixes-2\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eAxiosError:\u003c/strong\u003e Fixed \u003ccode\u003eAxiosError.from\u003c/code\u003e not copying the \u003ccode\u003estatus\u003c/code\u003e field from the source error. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7403\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eAxiosError:\u003c/strong\u003e Made the \u003ccode\u003emessage\u003c/code\u003e property enumerable so it appears in \u003ccode\u003eJSON.stringify\u003c/code\u003e output and \u003ccode\u003eObject.keys\u003c/code\u003e. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7392\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFormData Detection:\u003c/strong\u003e Corrected safe FormData detection for WeChat Mini Program environments. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7324\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eReact Native / Browserify Export:\u003c/strong\u003e Fixed broken module export that caused import failures in React Native and Browserify. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7386\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🔧 Maintenance \u0026amp; Chores\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--maintenance--chores-2\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🔧 Maintenance \u0026amp; Chores\" href=\"#-maintenance--chores-2\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDependencies:\u003c/strong\u003e Migrated \u003ccode\u003e@rollup/plugin-babel\u003c/code\u003e from v5 to v6 and bumped the development dependencies group. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7424\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003e#7432\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🌟 New Contributors\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--new-contributors-2\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🌟 New Contributors\" href=\"#-new-contributors-2\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eWe are thrilled to welcome our new contributors. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7392\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e@Shiwaangee\u003c/strong\u003e (\u003cstrong\u003e#7324\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e@Gudahtt\u003c/strong\u003e 2026\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-v1135--february-8-2026\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: v1.13.5 — February 8, 2026\" href=\"#v1135--february-8-2026\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThis release patches a prototype pollution denial-of-service vulnerability, fixes a missing \u003ccode\u003estatus\u003c/code\u003e field regression in \u003ccode\u003eAxiosError\u003c/code\u003e, adds interceptor ordering control, and introduces URL validation for \u003ccode\u003eisAbsoluteURL\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🔒 Security Fixes\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--security-fixes-2\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🔒 Security Fixes\" href=\"#-security-fixes-2\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003ePrototype Pollution (DoS):\u003c/strong\u003e Hardened \u003ccode\u003emergeConfig\u003c/code\u003e to ignore \u003ccode\u003e__proto__\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003econstructor\u003c/code\u003e, and \u003ccode\u003eprototype\u003c/code\u003e keys, preventing denial-of-service via prototype pollution when merging user-supplied config. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7369\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🚀 New Features\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--new-features-2\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🚀 New Features\" href=\"#-new-features-2\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e\u003ccode\u003eisAbsoluteURL\u003c/code\u003e Validation:\u003c/strong\u003e Added input validation to \u003ccode\u003eisAbsoluteURL\u003c/code\u003e to handle malformed or unexpected input gracefully. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7326\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🐛 Bug Fixes\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--bug-fixes-3\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🐛 Bug Fixes\" href=\"#-bug-fixes-3\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eAxiosError \u003ccode\u003estatus\u003c/code\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e Restored the \u003ccode\u003estatus\u003c/code\u003e field on \u003ccode\u003eAxiosError\u003c/code\u003e instances, which was missing in v1.13.3 and later. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7368\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eInterceptor Ordering:\u003c/strong\u003e Added a \u003ccode\u003euseLegacyInterceptorOrder\u003c/code\u003e option to restore pre-v1.13 interceptor execution order for applications relying on the previous behaviour. (\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/569f028a5878faaec8d7d138ba686aac407bda4c\"\u003e569f028\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🔧 Maintenance \u0026amp; Chores\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--maintenance--chores-3\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 🔧 Maintenance \u0026amp; Chores\" href=\"#-maintenance--chores-3\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eCI:\u003c/strong\u003e Fixed run conditions and updated workflow YAMLs. dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003ev1.13.3 Regressions:\u003c/strong\u003e Fixed multiple issues introduced by the v1.13.3 release, including broken merge configs. (\u003cstrong\u003e#7352\u003c/strong\u003e)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eTypeScript Exports:\u003c/strong\u003e Corrected TypeScript export declarations to restore proper type resolution. overflow-auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"\n📢 This PR added \u0026amp;#x27;withXSRFToken\u0026amp;#x27; option as a replacement for old withCredentials behaviour.\nYou should now use \u0026amp;#x27;withXSRFToken\u0026amp;#x27; option as a replacement for old withCredentials behaviour.\nYou should now use withXSRFToken along with withCredential to get the old behavior.\nThis class=\"notranslate\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003e\n📢 This PR added \u0026amp;#x27;withXSRFToken\u0026amp;#x27; option as a replacement for old withCredentials behaviour.\nYou should now use withXSRFToken .md","blob":{"copilotSWEAgentEnabled":false,"dependabotInfo":{"showConfigurationBanner":false,"configFilePath":null,"networkDependabotPath":"/axios/axios/network/updates","dismissConfigurationNoticePath":"/settings/dismiss-notice/dependabot_configuration_notice","configurationNoticeDismissed":null},"displayName":"CHANGELOG.md","displayUrl":"https://github.com/axios/axios/blob/v1.x/CHANGELOG.md?raw=true","headerInfo":{"blobSize":"111 KB","deleteTooltip":"You must be signed in to make or propose changes","editTooltip":"You must be signed in to make or propose changes","ghDesktopPath":"https://desktop.github.com","isGitLfs":false,"onBranch":true,"shortPath":"6c28056","siteNavLoginPath":"/login?return_to=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Faxios%2Faxios%2Fblob%2Fv1.x%2FCHANGELOG.md","isCSV":false,"isRichtext":true,"lineInfo":{"truncatedLoc":"1582","truncatedSloc":"1053"},"mode":"file"},"image":false,"isCodeownersFile":null,"isPlain":false,"isValidLegacyIssueTemplate":false,"isIssueTemplate":false,"isDiscussionTemplate":false,"language":"Markdown","languageID":222,"large":false,"planSupportInfo":{"repoIsFork":null,"repoOwnedByCurrentUser":null,"requestFullPath":"/axios/axios/blob/v1.x/CHANGELOG.md","showFreeOrgGatedFeatureMessage":null,"showPlanSupportBanner":null,"upgradeDataAttributes":null,"upgradePath":null},"publishBannersInfo":{"dismissActionNoticePath":"/settings/dismiss-notice/publish_action_from_dockerfile","releasePath":"/axios/axios/releases/new?marketplace=true","showPublishActionBanner":false},"rawBlobUrl":"https://github.com/axios/axios/raw/refs/heads/v1.x/CHANGELOG.md","renderImageOrRaw":false,"shortPath":null,"symbolsEnabled":true,"tabSize":4,"topBannersInfo":{"overridingGlobalFundingFile":false,"globalPreferredFundingPath":null,"showInvalidCitationWarning":false,"citationHelpUrl":"https://docs.github.com/github/creating-cloning-and-archiving-repositories/creating-a-repository-on-github/about-citation-files","actionsOnboardingTip":null},"truncated":false,"viewable":true,"workflowRedirectUrl":null},"copilotInfo":null,"copilotAccessAllowed":false,"copilotSpacesEnabled":false,"modelsAccessAllowed":false,"modelsRepoIntegrationEnabled":false,"isMarketplaceEnabled":true},"codeViewBlobLayoutRoute.StyledBlob":{"rawLines":["# Changelog\r","\r","## v1.15.0 — April 7, 2026\r","\r","This release delivers two critical security patches targeting header injection and SSRF via proxy bypass, adds official runtime support for Deno and Bun, and includes significant CI security hardening.\r","\r","## 🔒 Security Fixes\r","\r","* **Header Injection (CRLF):** Rejects any header value containing `\\r` or `\\n` characters to block CRLF injection chains that could be used to exfiltrate cloud metadata (IMDS). Behavior change: headers with CR/LF now throw `\"Invalid character in header content\"`. (__#10660__)\r","\r","* **SSRF via `no_proxy` Bypass:** Introduces a `shouldBypassProxy` helper that normalises hostnames (strips trailing dots, handles bracketed IPv6) before evaluating `no_proxy`/`NO_PROXY` rules, closing a gap that could cause loopback or internal hosts to be inadvertently proxied. (__#10661__)\r","\r","## 🚀 New Features\r","\r","* **Deno \u0026 Bun Runtime Support:** Added full smoke test suites for Deno and Bun, with CI workflows that run both runtimes before any release is cut. (__#10652__)\r","\r","## 🐛 Bug Fixes\r","\r","* **Node.js v22 Compatibility:** Replaced deprecated `url.parse()` calls with the WHATWG `URL`/`URLSearchParams` API across examples, sandbox, and tests, eliminating `DEP0169` deprecation warnings on Node.js v22+. (__#10625__)\r","\r","## 🔧 Maintenance \u0026 Chores\r","\r","* **CI Security Hardening:** Added [zizmor](https://github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor) GitHub Actions security scanner; switched npm publish to OIDC Trusted Publishing (removing the long-lived `NODE_AUTH_TOKEN`); pinned all action references to full commit SHAs; narrowed workflow permissions to least privilege; gated the publish step behind a dedicated `npm-publish` environment; and blocked the sponsor-block workflow from running on forks. (__#10618__, __#10619__, __#10627__, __#10637__, __#10641__, __#10666__)\r","\r","* **Docs:** Clarified HTTP/2 support and the unsupported `httpVersion` option; added documentation for header case preservation; improved the `beforeRedirect` example to prevent accidental credential leakage. (__#10644__, __#10654__, __#10624__)\r","\r","* **Dependencies:** Bumped `picomatch`, `handlebars`, `serialize-javascript`, `vite` (×3), `denoland/setup-deno`, and 4 additional dev dependencies to latest versions. (__#10564__, __#10565__, __#10567__, __#10568__, __#10572__, __#10574__, __#10663__, __#10664__, __#10665__, __#10669__, __#10670__)\r","\r","## 🌟 New Contributors\r","\r","We are thrilled to welcome our new contributors. Thank you for helping improve axios:\r","\r","* **@Kilros0817** (__#10625__)\r","* **@shaanmajid** (__#10616__, __#10617__, __#10618__, __#10619__, __#10637__, __#10641__, __#10666__)\r","* **@ashstrc** (__#10624__, __#10644__)\r","* **@Abhi3975** (__#10589__)\r","* **@raashish1601** (__#10573__)\r","\r","[Full Changelog](https://github.com/axios/axios/compare/v1.14.0...v1.15.0)\r","\r","---\r","\r","## v1.14.0 — March 27, 2026\r","\r","This release fixes a security vulnerability in the `formidable` dependency, resolves a CommonJS compatibility regression, hardens proxy and HTTP/2 handling, and modernises the build and test toolchain.\r","\r","## 🔒 Security Fixes\r","\r","* **Formidable Vulnerability:** Upgraded `formidable` from v2 to v3 to address a reported arbitrary-file vulnerability. Updated test server and assertions to align with the v3 API. (__#7533__)\r","\r","## 🐛 Bug Fixes\r","\r","* **CommonJS Compatibility:** Restored `require('axios')` in Node.js by correcting the `main` field in `package.json` to point to the built CJS bundle. (__#7532__)\r","\r","* **Fetch Adapter:** Cancel the `ReadableStream` body after the request stream capability probe to prevent resource leaks. (__#7515__)\r","\r","* **Proxy:** Upgraded `proxy-from-env` to v2 and switched to the named `getProxyForUrl` export, fixing proxy detection from environment variables and resolving CJS bundling errors. (__#7499__)\r","\r","* **HTTP/2:** Close detached HTTP/2 sessions on timeout to free resources when no new requests arrive. (__#7457__)\r","\r","* **Headers:** Trim trailing CRLF characters from normalised header values. (__#7456__)\r","\r","## 🔧 Maintenance \u0026 Chores\r","\r","* **Toolchain Modernisation:** Migrated test suite to Vitest, updated ESLint to v10, upgraded Rollup and `@rollup/plugin-babel`, migrated to Husky 9, upgraded TypeScript to latest, and modernised the Express test harness. (__#7484__, __#7489__, __#7498__, __#7505__, __#7506__, __#7507__, __#7508__, __#7509__, __#7510__, __#7516__, __#7522__)\r","\r","* **Dependencies:** Bumped `multer` to v2, `minimatch`, `tar`, `pacote`, `@babel/preset-env`, and additional dev dependencies. (__#7453__, __#7480__, __#7491__, __#7504__, __#7517__, __#7531__)\r","\r","## 🌟 New Contributors\r","\r","We are thrilled to welcome our new contributors. Thank you for helping improve axios:\r","\r","* **@penkzhou** (__#7515__)\r","* **@aviu16** (__#7456__)\r","* **@fedotov** (__#7457__)\r","\r","[Full Changelog](https://github.com/axios/axios/compare/v1.13.6...v1.14.0)\r","\r","---\r","\r","## v1.13.6 — February 27, 2026\r","\r","This release adds React Native Blob support, fixes several enumeration and export regressions, and patches FormData detection for WeChat Mini Program environments.\r","\r","## 🚀 New Features\r","\r","* **React Native Blob Support:** Axios now correctly handles native Blob objects in React Native environments. (__#5764__)\r","\r","## 🐛 Bug Fixes\r","\r","* **AxiosError:** Fixed `AxiosError.from` not copying the `status` field from the source error. (__#7403__)\r","\r","* **AxiosError:** Made the `message` property enumerable so it appears in `JSON.stringify` output and `Object.keys`. (__#7392__)\r","\r","* **FormData Detection:** Corrected safe FormData detection for WeChat Mini Program environments. (__#7324__)\r","\r","* **React Native / Browserify Export:** Fixed broken module export that caused import failures in React Native and Browserify. (__#7386__)\r","\r","## 🔧 Maintenance \u0026 Chores\r","\r","* **Dependencies:** Migrated `@rollup/plugin-babel` from v5 to v6 and bumped the development dependencies group. (__#7424__, __#7432__)\r","\r","## 🌟 New Contributors\r","\r","We are thrilled to welcome our new contributors. Thank you for helping improve axios:\r","\r","* **@moh3n9595** (__#5764__)\r","* **@skrtheboss** (__#7403__)\r","* **@ybbus** (__#7392__)\r","* **@Shiwaangee** (__#7324__)\r","* **@Gudahtt** (__#7386__)\r","\r","[Full Changelog](https://github.com/axios/axios/compare/v1.13.5...v1.13.6)\r","\r","---\r","\r","## v1.13.5 — February 8, 2026\r","\r","This release patches a prototype pollution denial-of-service vulnerability, fixes a missing `status` field regression in `AxiosError`, adds interceptor ordering control, and introduces URL validation for `isAbsoluteURL`.\r","\r","## 🔒 Security Fixes\r","\r","* **Prototype Pollution (DoS):** Hardened `mergeConfig` to ignore `__proto__`, `constructor`, and `prototype` keys, preventing denial-of-service via prototype pollution when merging user-supplied config. (__#7369__)\r","\r","## 🚀 New Features\r","\r","* **`isAbsoluteURL` Validation:** Added input validation to `isAbsoluteURL` to handle malformed or unexpected input gracefully. (__#7326__)\r","\r","## 🐛 Bug Fixes\r","\r","* **AxiosError `status`:** Restored the `status` field on `AxiosError` instances, which was missing in v1.13.3 and later. (__#7368__)\r","\r","* **Interceptor Ordering:** Added a `useLegacyInterceptorOrder` option to restore pre-v1.13 interceptor execution order for applications relying on the previous behaviour. ([569f028](https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/569f028a5878faaec8d7d138ba686aac407bda4c))\r","\r","## 🔧 Maintenance \u0026 Chores\r","\r","* **CI:** Fixed run conditions and updated workflow YAMLs. (__#7372__, __#7373__)\r","\r","* **Dependencies:** Bumped `karma-sourcemap-loader` and minor package versions. (__#7356__, __#7360__)\r","\r","## 🌟 New Contributors\r","\r","We are thrilled to welcome our new contributors. Thank you for helping improve axios:\r","\r","* **@asmitha-16** (__#7326__)\r","\r","[Full Changelog](https://github.com/axios/axios/compare/v1.13.4...v1.13.5)\r","\r","---\r","\r","## v1.13.4 — January 27, 2026\r","\r","Patch release fixing regressions introduced in v1.13.3, including TypeScript export compatibility and CI/build stability.\r","\r","## 🐛 Bug Fixes\r","\r","* **v1.13.3 Regressions:** Fixed multiple issues introduced by the v1.13.3 release, including broken merge configs. (__#7352__)\r","\r","* **TypeScript Exports:** Corrected TypeScript export declarations to restore proper type resolution. (__#4884__)\r","\r","## 🔧 Maintenance \u0026 Chores\r","\r","* **CI \u0026 Build:** Refactored CI pipeline and build configuration for stability. (__#7340__)\r","\r","[Full Changelog](https://github.com/axios/axios/compare/v1.13.3...v1.13.4)\r","\r","---\r","\r","## [1.13.3](https://github.com/axios/axios/compare/v1.13.2...v1.13.3) (2026-01-20)\r","\r","### Bug Fixes\r","\r","- **http2:** Use port 443 for HTTPS connections by default. ([#7256](https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/7256)) ([d7e6065](https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/d7e60653460480ffacecf85383012ca1baa6263e))\r","- **interceptor:** handle the error in the same interceptor ([#6269](https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/6269)) ([5945e40](https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/5945e40bb171d4ac4fc195df276cf952244f0f89))\r","- main field in package.json should correspond to cjs artifacts ([#5756](https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5756)) ([7373fbf](https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/7373fbff24cd92ce650d99ff6f7fe08c2e2a0a04))\r","- **package.json:** add 'bun' package.json 'exports' condition. Load the Node.js build in Bun instead of the browser build ([#5754](https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5754)) ([b89217e](https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/b89217e3e91de17a3d55e2b8f39ceb0e9d8aeda8))\r","- silentJSONParsing=false should throw on invalid JSON ([7d19335](https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/7d19335e43d6754a1a9a66e424f7f7da259895bf))\r","- turn AxiosError into a native error ([#5394](https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5394)) restore AxiosError.cause type from unknown to Error ([#7327](https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/7327)) ([d8233d9](https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/d8233d9e8e9a64bfba9bbe01d475ba417510b82b))\r","- unclear error message is thrown when specifying an empty proxy authorization [#6732](https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/6732)\r","\r","### BREAKING CHANGES\r","\r","- code relying on the above will now combine the URLs instead of prefer request URL\r","\r","- feat: add config option for allowing absolute URLs\r","\r","- fix: add default value for allowAbsoluteUrls in buildFullPath\r","\r","- fix: typo in flow control when setting allowAbsoluteUrls\r","\r","### See https://security.snyk.io/vuln/SNYK-JS-AXIOS-6032459\r","```\r","\r","## [1.0.0] - 2022-10-04\r","\r","### Added\r","\r","- Added stack trace to AxiosError [#4624](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4624)\r","- Add AxiosError to AxiosStatic [#4654](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4654)\r","- Replaced Rollup as our build runner [#4596](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4596)\r","- Added generic TS types for the exposed toFormData helper [#4668](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4668)\r","- Added listen callback function [#4096](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4096)\r","- Added instructions for installing using PNPM [#4207](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4207)\r","- Added generic AxiosAbortSignal TS interface to avoid importing AbortController polyfill [#4229](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4229)\r","- Added axios-url-template in ECOSYSTEM.md [#4238](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4238)\r","- Added a clear() function to the request and response interceptors object so a user can ensure that all interceptors have been removed from an axios instance [#4248](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4248)\r","- Added react hook plugin [#4319](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4319)\r","- Adding HTTP status code for transformResponse [#4580](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4580)\r","- Added blob to the list of protocols supported by the browser [#4678](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4678)\r","- Resolving proxy from env on redirect [#4436](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4436)\r","- Added enhanced toFormData implementation with additional options [4704](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4704)\r","- Adding Canceler parameters config and request [#4711](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4711)\r","- Added automatic payload serialization to application/x-www-form-urlencoded [#4714](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4714)\r","- Added the ability for webpack users to overwrite built-ins [#4715](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4715)\r","- Added string[] to AxiosRequestHeaders type [#4322](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4322)\r","- Added the ability for the url-encoded-form serializer to respect the formSerializer config [#4721](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4721)\r","- Added isCancel type assert [#4293](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4293)\r","- Added data URL support for node.js [#4725](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4725)\r","- Adding types for progress event callbacks [#4675](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4675)\r","- URL params serializer [#4734](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4734)\r","- Added axios.formToJSON method [#4735](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4735)\r","- Bower platform add data protocol [#4804](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4804)\r","- Use WHATWG URL API instead of url.parse() [#4852](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4852)\r","- Add ENUM containing Http Status Codes to typings [#4903](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4903)\r","- Improve typing of timeout in index.d.ts [#4934](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4934)\r","\r","### Changed\r","\r","- Updated AxiosError.config to be optional in the type definition [#4665](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4665)\r","- Updated README emphasizing the URLSearchParam built-in interface over other solutions [#4590](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4590)\r","- Include request and config when creating a CanceledError instance [#4659](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4659)\r","- Changed func-names eslint rule to as-needed [#4492](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4492)\r","- Replacing deprecated substr() with slice() as substr() is deprecated [#4468](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4468)\r","- Updating HTTP links in README.md to use HTTPS [#4387](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4387)\r","- Updated to a better trim() polyfill [#4072](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4072)\r","- Updated types to allow specifying partial default headers on instance create [#4185](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4185)\r","- Expanded isAxiosError types [#4344](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4344)\r","- Updated type definition for axios instance methods [#4224](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4224)\r","- Updated eslint config [#4722](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4722)\r","- Updated Docs [#4742](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4742)\r","- Refactored Axios to use ES2017 [#4787](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4787)\r","\r","### Deprecated\r","\r","- There are multiple deprecations, refactors and fixes provided in this release. Please read through the full release notes to see how this may impact your project and use case.\r","\r","### Removed\r","\r","- Removed incorrect argument for NetworkError constructor [#4656](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4656)\r","- Removed Webpack [#4596](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4596)\r","- Removed function that transform arguments to array [#4544](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4544)\r","\r","### Fixed\r","\r","- Fixed grammar in README [#4649](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4649)\r","- Fixed code error in README [#4599](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4599)\r","- Optimized the code that checks cancellation [#4587](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4587)\r","- Fix url pointing to defaults.js in README [#4532](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4532)\r","- Use type alias instead of interface for AxiosPromise [#4505](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4505)\r","- Fix some word spelling and lint style in code comments [#4500](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4500)\r","- Edited readme with 3 updated browser icons of Chrome, FireFox and Safari [#4414](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4414)\r","- Bump follow-redirects from 1.14.9 to 1.15.0 [#4673](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4673)\r","- Fixing http tests to avoid hanging when assertions fail [#4435](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4435)\r","- Fix TS definition for AxiosRequestTransformer [#4201](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4201)\r","- Fix grammatical issues in README [#4232](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4232)\r","- Fixing instance.defaults.headers type [#4557](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4557)\r","- Fixed race condition on immediate requests cancellation [#4261](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4261)\r","- Fixing Z_BUF_ERROR when no content [#4701](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4701)\r","- Fixing proxy beforeRedirect regression [#4708](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4708)\r","- Fixed AxiosError status code type [#4717](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4717)\r","- Fixed AxiosError stack capturing [#4718](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4718)\r","- Fixing AxiosRequestHeaders typings [#4334](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4334)\r","- Fixed max body length defaults [#4731](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4731)\r","- Fixed toFormData Blob issue on node\u003ev17 [#4728](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4728)\r","- Bump grunt from 1.5.2 to 1.5.3 [#4743](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4743)\r","- Fixing content-type header repeated [#4745](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4745)\r","- Fixed timeout error message for http [4738](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4738)\r","- Request ignores false, 0 and empty string as body values [#4785](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4785)\r","- Added back missing minified builds [#4805](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4805)\r","- Fixed a type error [#4815](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4815)\r","- Fixed a regression bug with unsubscribing from cancel token; [#4819](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4819)\r","- Remove repeated compression algorithm [#4820](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4820)\r","- The error of calling extend to pass parameters [#4857](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4857)\r","- SerializerOptions.indexes allows boolean | null | undefined [#4862](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4862)\r","- Require interceptors to return values [#4874](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4874)\r","- Removed unused imports [#4949](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4949)\r","- Allow null indexes on formSerializer and paramsSerializer [#4960](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4960)\r","\r","### Chores\r","\r","- Set permissions for GitHub actions [#4765](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4765)\r","- Included githubactions in the dependabot config [#4770](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4770)\r","- Included dependency review [#4771](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4771)\r","- Update security.md [#4784](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4784)\r","- Remove unnecessary spaces [#4854](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4854)\r","- Simplify the import path of AxiosError [#4875](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4875)\r","- Fix Gitpod dead link [#4941](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4941)\r","- Enable syntax highlighting for a code block [#4970](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4970)\r","- Using Logo Axios in Readme.md [#4993](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4993)\r","- Fix markup for note in README [#4825](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4825)\r","- Fix typo and formatting, add colons [#4853](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4853)\r","- Fix typo in readme [#4942](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4942)\r","\r","### Security\r","\r","- Update SECURITY.md [#4687](https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4687)\r","\r","### Contributors to this 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">v1.15.0 — April 7, 2026</h2><a id="user-content-v1150--april-7-2026" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: v1.15.0 — April 7, 2026" href="#v1150--april-7-2026"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This release delivers two critical security patches targeting header injection and SSRF via proxy bypass, adds official runtime support for Deno and Bun, and includes significant CI security hardening.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🔒 Security Fixes</h2><a id="user-content--security-fixes" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🔒 Security Fixes" href="#-security-fixes"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Header Injection (CRLF):</strong> Rejects any header value containing <code>\r</code> or <code>\n</code> characters to block CRLF injection chains that could be used to exfiltrate cloud metadata (IMDS). Behavior change: headers with CR/LF now throw <code>"Invalid character in header content"</code>. (<strong>#10660</strong>)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>SSRF via <code>no_proxy</code> Bypass:</strong> Introduces a <code>shouldBypassProxy</code> helper that normalises hostnames (strips trailing dots, handles bracketed IPv6) before evaluating <code>no_proxy</code>/<code>NO_PROXY</code> rules, closing a gap that could cause loopback or internal hosts to be inadvertently proxied. (<strong>#10661</strong>)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🚀 New Features</h2><a id="user-content--new-features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🚀 New Features" href="#-new-features"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Deno &amp; Bun Runtime Support:</strong> Added full smoke test suites for Deno and Bun, with CI workflows that run both runtimes before any release is cut. (<strong>#10652</strong>)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🐛 Bug Fixes</h2><a id="user-content--bug-fixes" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🐛 Bug Fixes" href="#-bug-fixes"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Node.js v22 Compatibility:</strong> Replaced deprecated <code>url.parse()</code> calls with the WHATWG <code>URL</code>/<code>URLSearchParams</code> API across examples, sandbox, and tests, eliminating <code>DEP0169</code> deprecation warnings on Node.js v22+. (<strong>#10625</strong>)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🔧 Maintenance &amp; Chores</h2><a id="user-content--maintenance--chores" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🔧 Maintenance &amp; Chores" href="#-maintenance--chores"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>CI Security Hardening:</strong> Added <a href="https://github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor">zizmor</a> GitHub Actions security scanner; switched npm publish to OIDC Trusted Publishing (removing the long-lived <code>NODE_AUTH_TOKEN</code>); pinned all action references to full commit SHAs; narrowed workflow permissions to least privilege; gated the publish step behind a dedicated <code>npm-publish</code> environment; and blocked the sponsor-block workflow from running on forks. (<strong>#10618</strong>, <strong>#10619</strong>, <strong>#10627</strong>, <strong>#10637</strong>, <strong>#10641</strong>, <strong>#10666</strong>)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Docs:</strong> Clarified HTTP/2 support and the unsupported <code>httpVersion</code> option; added documentation for header case preservation; improved the <code>beforeRedirect</code> example to prevent accidental credential leakage. (<strong>#10644</strong>, <strong>#10654</strong>, <strong>#10624</strong>)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Dependencies:</strong> Bumped <code>picomatch</code>, <code>handlebars</code>, <code>serialize-javascript</code>, <code>vite</code> (×3), <code>denoland/setup-deno</code>, and 4 additional dev dependencies to latest versions. (<strong>#10564</strong>, <strong>#10565</strong>, <strong>#10567</strong>, <strong>#10568</strong>, <strong>#10572</strong>, <strong>#10574</strong>, <strong>#10663</strong>, <strong>#10664</strong>, <strong>#10665</strong>, <strong>#10669</strong>, <strong>#10670</strong>)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🌟 New Contributors</h2><a id="user-content--new-contributors" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🌟 New Contributors" href="#-new-contributors"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">We are thrilled to welcome our new contributors. Thank you for helping improve axios:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>@Kilros0817</strong> (<strong>#10625</strong>)</li>
<li><strong>@shaanmajid</strong> (<strong>#10616</strong>, <strong>#10617</strong>, <strong>#10618</strong>, <strong>#10619</strong>, <strong>#10637</strong>, <strong>#10641</strong>, <strong>#10666</strong>)</li>
<li><strong>@ashstrc</strong> (<strong>#10624</strong>, <strong>#10644</strong>)</li>
<li><strong>@Abhi3975</strong> (<strong>#10589</strong>)</li>
<li><strong>@raashish1601</strong> (<strong>#10573</strong>)</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/compare/v1.14.0...v1.15.0">Full Changelog</a></p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">v1.14.0 — March 27, 2026</h2><a id="user-content-v1140--march-27-2026" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: v1.14.0 — March 27, 2026" href="#v1140--march-27-2026"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This release fixes a security vulnerability in the <code>formidable</code> dependency, resolves a CommonJS compatibility regression, hardens proxy and HTTP/2 handling, and modernises the build and test toolchain.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🔒 Security Fixes</h2><a id="user-content--security-fixes-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🔒 Security Fixes" href="#-security-fixes-1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Formidable Vulnerability:</strong> Upgraded <code>formidable</code> from v2 to v3 to address a reported arbitrary-file vulnerability. Updated test server and assertions to align with the v3 API. (<strong>#7533</strong>)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🐛 Bug Fixes</h2><a id="user-content--bug-fixes-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🐛 Bug Fixes" href="#-bug-fixes-1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>CommonJS Compatibility:</strong> Restored <code>require('axios')</code> in Node.js by correcting the <code>main</code> field in <code>package.json</code> to point to the built CJS bundle. (<strong>#7532</strong>)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Fetch Adapter:</strong> Cancel the <code>ReadableStream</code> body after the request stream capability probe to prevent resource leaks. (<strong>#7515</strong>)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Proxy:</strong> Upgraded <code>proxy-from-env</code> to v2 and switched to the named <code>getProxyForUrl</code> export, fixing proxy detection from environment variables and resolving CJS bundling errors. (<strong>#7499</strong>)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>HTTP/2:</strong> Close detached HTTP/2 sessions on timeout to free resources when no new requests arrive. (<strong>#7457</strong>)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Headers:</strong> Trim trailing CRLF characters from normalised header values. (<strong>#7456</strong>)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🔧 Maintenance &amp; Chores</h2><a id="user-content--maintenance--chores-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🔧 Maintenance &amp; Chores" href="#-maintenance--chores-1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Toolchain Modernisation:</strong> Migrated test suite to Vitest, updated ESLint to v10, upgraded Rollup and <code>@rollup/plugin-babel</code>, migrated to Husky 9, upgraded TypeScript to latest, and modernised the Express test harness. (<strong>#7484</strong>, <strong>#7489</strong>, <strong>#7498</strong>, <strong>#7505</strong>, <strong>#7506</strong>, <strong>#7507</strong>, <strong>#7508</strong>, <strong>#7509</strong>, <strong>#7510</strong>, <strong>#7516</strong>, <strong>#7522</strong>)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Dependencies:</strong> Bumped <code>multer</code> to v2, <code>minimatch</code>, <code>tar</code>, <code>pacote</code>, <code>@babel/preset-env</code>, and additional dev dependencies. (<strong>#7453</strong>, <strong>#7480</strong>, <strong>#7491</strong>, <strong>#7504</strong>, <strong>#7517</strong>, <strong>#7531</strong>)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🌟 New Contributors</h2><a id="user-content--new-contributors-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🌟 New Contributors" href="#-new-contributors-1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">We are thrilled to welcome our new contributors. Thank you for helping improve axios:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>@penkzhou</strong> (<strong>#7515</strong>)</li>
<li><strong>@aviu16</strong> (<strong>#7456</strong>)</li>
<li><strong>@fedotov</strong> (<strong>#7457</strong>)</li>
</ul>
