<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Bug Fixes</h3><a id="user-content-bug-fixes-35" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Bug Fixes" href="#bug-fixes-35"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>adapter:</strong> make adapter loading error more clear by using platform-specific adapters explicitly (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5837" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5837/hovercard">#5837</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/9a414bb6c81796a95c6c7fe668637825458e8b6d">9a414bb</a>)</li>
<li><strong>dns:</strong> fixed <code>cacheable-lookup</code> integration; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5836" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5836/hovercard">#5836</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/b3e327dcc9277bdce34c7ef57beedf644b00d628">b3e327d</a>)</li>
<li><strong>headers:</strong> added support for setting header names that overlap with class methods; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5831" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5831/hovercard">#5831</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/d8b4ca0ea5f2f05efa4edfe1e7684593f9f68273">d8b4ca0</a>)</li>
<li><strong>headers:</strong> fixed common Content-Type header merging; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5832" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5832/hovercard">#5832</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/8fda2766b1e6bcb72c3fabc146223083ef13ce17">8fda276</a>)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Features</h3><a id="user-content-features-9" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Features" href="#features-9"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>export getAdapter function (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5324" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5324/hovercard">#5324</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/ca73eb878df0ae2dace81fe3a7f1fb5986231bf1">ca73eb8</a>)</li>
<li><strong>export:</strong> export adapters without <code>unsafe</code> prefix (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5839" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5839/hovercard">#5839</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/1601f4a27a81ab47fea228f1e244b2c4e3ce28bf">1601f4a</a>)</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/compare/v1.3.6...v1.4.0">1.4.0</a> (2023-04-27)</h1><a id="user-content-140-2023-04-27" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.4.0 (2023-04-27)" href="#140-2023-04-27"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Bug Fixes</h3><a id="user-content-bug-fixes-36" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Bug Fixes" href="#bug-fixes-36"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>formdata:</strong> add <code>multipart/form-data</code> content type for FormData payload on custom client environments; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5678" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5678/hovercard">#5678</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/bbb61e70cb1185adfb1cbbb86eaf6652c48d89d1">bbb61e7</a>)</li>
<li><strong>package:</strong> export package internals with unsafe path prefix; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5677" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5677/hovercard">#5677</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/df38c949f26414d88ba29ec1e353c4d4f97eaf09">df38c94</a>)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Features</h3><a id="user-content-features-10" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Features" href="#features-10"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>dns:</strong> added support for a custom lookup function; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5339" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5339/hovercard">#5339</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/2701911260a1faa5cc5e1afe437121b330a3b7bb">2701911</a>)</li>
<li><strong>types:</strong> export <code>AxiosHeaderValue</code> type. (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5525" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5525/hovercard">#5525</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/726f1c8e00cffa0461a8813a9bdcb8f8b9d762cf">726f1c8</a>)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Performance Improvements</h3><a id="user-content-performance-improvements-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Performance Improvements" href="#performance-improvements-1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>types:</strong> added transport to RawAxiosRequestConfig (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5445" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5445/hovercard">#5445</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/6f360a2531d8d70363fd9becef6a45a323f170e2">6f360a2</a>)</li>
<li><strong>utils:</strong> make isFormData detection logic stricter to avoid unnecessary calling of the <code>toString</code> method on the target; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5661" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5661/hovercard">#5661</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/aa372f7306295dfd1100c1c2c77ce95c95808e76">aa372f7</a>)</li>
</ul>

<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>headers:</strong> fixed isValidHeaderName to support full list of allowed characters; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5584" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5584/hovercard">#5584</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/e7decef6a99f4627e27ed9ea5b00ce8e201c3841">e7decef</a>)</li>
<li><strong>params:</strong> re-added the ability to set the function as <code>paramsSerializer</code> config; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5633" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5633/hovercard">#5633</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/a56c8661209d5ce5a645a05f294a0e08a6c1f6b3">a56c866</a>)</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Bug Fixes</h3><a id="user-content-bug-fixes-39" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Bug Fixes" href="#bug-fixes-39"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>blob:</strong> added a check to make sure the Blob class is available in the browser's global scope; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5548" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5548/hovercard">#5548</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/3772c8fe74112a56e3e9551f894d899bc3a9443a">3772c8f</a>)</li>
<li><strong>http:</strong> fixed regression bug when handling synchronous errors inside the adapter; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5564" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5564/hovercard">#5564</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/a3b246c9de5c3bc4b5a742e15add55b375479451">a3b246c</a>)</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/compare/v1.3.2...v1.3.3">1.3.3</a> (2023-02-13)</h2><a id="user-content-133-2023-02-13" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1.3.3 (2023-02-13)" href="#133-2023-02-13"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Bug Fixes</h3><a id="user-content-bug-fixes-40" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Bug Fixes" href="#bug-fixes-40"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>formdata:</strong> added a check to make sure the FormData class is available in the browser's global scope; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5545" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5545/hovercard">#5545</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/a6dfa72010db5ad52db8bd13c0f98e537e8fd05d">a6dfa72</a>)</li>
<li><strong>formdata:</strong> fixed setting NaN as Content-Length for form payload in some cases; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5535" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5535/hovercard">#5535</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/c19f7bf770f90ae8307f4ea3104f227056912da1">c19f7bf</a>)</li>
<li><strong>headers:</strong> fixed the filtering logic of the clear method; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5542" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5542/hovercard">#5542</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/ea87ebfe6d1699af072b9e7cd40faf8f14b0ab93">ea87ebf</a>)</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Bug Fixes</h3><a id="user-content-bug-fixes-41" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Bug Fixes" href="#bug-fixes-41"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>http:</strong> treat <a href="http://localhost" rel="nofollow">http://localhost</a> as base URL for relative paths to avoid <code>ERR_INVALID_URL</code> error; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5528" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5528/hovercard">#5528</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/128d56f4a0fb8f5f2ed6e0dd80bc9225fee9538c">128d56f</a>)</li>
<li><strong>http:</strong> use explicit import instead of TextEncoder global; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5530" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5530/hovercard">#5530</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/6b3c305fc40c56428e0afabedc6f4d29c2830f6f">6b3c305</a>)</li>
</ul>

<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>formdata:</strong> add hotfix to use the asynchronous API to compute the content-length header value; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5521" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5521/hovercard">#5521</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/96d336f527619f21da012fe1f117eeb53e5a2120">96d336f</a>)</li>
<li><strong>serializer:</strong> fixed serialization of array-like objects; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5518" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5518/hovercard">#5518</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/08104c028c0f9353897b1b6691d74c440fd0c32d">08104c0</a>)</li>
</ul>

<li><strong>headers:</strong> fixed &amp; optimized clear method; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5507" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5507/hovercard">#5507</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/9915635c69d0ab70daca5738488421f67ca60959">9915635</a>)</li>

</ul>

<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>headers:</strong> added missed Authorization accessor; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5502" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5502/hovercard">#5502</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/342c0ba9a16ea50f5ed7d2366c5c1a2c877e3f26">342c0ba</a>)</li>
<li><strong>types:</strong> fixed <code>CommonRequestHeadersList</code> &amp; <code>CommonResponseHeadersList</code> types to be private in commonJS; (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/5503" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5503/hovercard">#5503</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/commit/5a3d0a3234d77361a1bc7cedee2da1e11df08e2c">5a3d0a3</a>)</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed</h3><a id="user-content-fixed-3" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed" href="#fixed-3"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed top-level export to keep them in-line with static properties <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/5109" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5109/hovercard">#5109</a></li>
<li>Stopped including null values to query string. <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/5108" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5108/hovercard">#5108</a></li>
<li>Restored proxy config backwards compatibility with 0.x <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/5097" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5097/hovercard">#5097</a></li>
<li>Added back AxiosHeaders in AxiosHeaderValue <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/5103" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5103/hovercard">#5103</a></li>
<li>Pin CDN install instructions to a specific version <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/5060" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5060/hovercard">#5060</a></li>
<li>Handling of array values fixed for AxiosHeaders <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/5085" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5085/hovercard">#5085</a></li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed</h3><a id="user-content-fixed-6" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed" href="#fixed-6"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed missing exports in type definition index.d.ts <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/5003" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5003/hovercard">#5003</a></li>
<li>Fixed query params composing <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/5018" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5018/hovercard">#5018</a></li>
<li>Fixed GenericAbortSignal interface by making it more generic <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/5021" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5021/hovercard">#5021</a></li>
<li>Fixed adding "clear" to AxiosInterceptorManager <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/5010" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5010/hovercard">#5010</a></li>
<li>Fixed commonjs &amp; umd exports <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/5030" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5030/hovercard">#5030</a></li>
<li>Fixed inability to access response headers when using axios 1.x with Jest <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/5036" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/5036/hovercard">#5036</a></li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">[1.0.0] - 2022-10-04</h2><a id="user-content-100---2022-10-04" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: [1.0.0] - 2022-10-04" href="#100---2022-10-04"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Added</h3><a id="user-content-added-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Added" href="#added-1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Added stack trace to AxiosError <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4624" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4624/hovercard">#4624</a></li>
<li>Add AxiosError to AxiosStatic <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4654" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4654/hovercard">#4654</a></li>
<li>Replaced Rollup as our build runner <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4596" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4596/hovercard">#4596</a></li>
<li>Added generic TS types for the exposed toFormData helper <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4668" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4668/hovercard">#4668</a></li>
<li>Added listen callback function <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4096" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4096/hovercard">#4096</a></li>
<li>Added instructions for installing using PNPM <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4207" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4207/hovercard">#4207</a></li>
<li>Added generic AxiosAbortSignal TS interface to avoid importing AbortController polyfill <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4229" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4229/hovercard">#4229</a></li>
<li>Added axios-url-template in ECOSYSTEM.md <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4238" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4238/hovercard">#4238</a></li>
<li>Added a clear() function to the request and response interceptors object so a user can ensure that all interceptors have been removed from an axios instance <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4248" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4248/hovercard">#4248</a></li>
<li>Added react hook plugin <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4319" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4319/hovercard">#4319</a></li>
<li>Adding HTTP status code for transformResponse <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4580" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4580/hovercard">#4580</a></li>
<li>Added blob to the list of protocols supported by the browser <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4678" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4678/hovercard">#4678</a></li>
<li>Resolving proxy from env on redirect <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4436" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4436/hovercard">#4436</a></li>
<li>Added enhanced toFormData implementation with additional options <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4704" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4704/hovercard">4704</a></li>
<li>Adding Canceler parameters config and request <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4711" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4711/hovercard">#4711</a></li>
<li>Added automatic payload serialization to application/x-www-form-urlencoded <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4714" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4714/hovercard">#4714</a></li>
<li>Added the ability for webpack users to overwrite built-ins <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4715" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4715/hovercard">#4715</a></li>
<li>Added string[] to AxiosRequestHeaders type <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4322" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4322/hovercard">#4322</a></li>
<li>Added the ability for the url-encoded-form serializer to respect the formSerializer config <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4721" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4721/hovercard">#4721</a></li>
<li>Added isCancel type assert <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4293" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4293/hovercard">#4293</a></li>
<li>Added data URL support for node.js <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4725" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4725/hovercard">#4725</a></li>
<li>Adding types for progress event callbacks <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4675" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4675/hovercard">#4675</a></li>
<li>URL params serializer <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4734" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4734/hovercard">#4734</a></li>
<li>Added axios.formToJSON method <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4735" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4735/hovercard">#4735</a></li>
<li>Bower platform add data protocol <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4804" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4804/hovercard">#4804</a></li>
<li>Use WHATWG URL API instead of url.parse() <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4852" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4852/hovercard">#4852</a></li>
<li>Add ENUM containing Http Status Codes to typings <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4903" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4903/hovercard">#4903</a></li>
<li>Improve typing of timeout in index.d.ts <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4934" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4934/hovercard">#4934</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Changed</h3><a id="user-content-changed-2" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Changed" href="#changed-2"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Updated AxiosError.config to be optional in the type definition <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4665" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4665/hovercard">#4665</a></li>
<li>Updated README emphasizing the URLSearchParam built-in interface over other solutions <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4590" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4590/hovercard">#4590</a></li>
<li>Include request and config when creating a CanceledError instance <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4659" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4659/hovercard">#4659</a></li>
<li>Changed func-names eslint rule to as-needed <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4492" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4492/hovercard">#4492</a></li>
<li>Replacing deprecated substr() with slice() as substr() is deprecated <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4468" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4468/hovercard">#4468</a></li>
<li>Updating HTTP links in README.md to use HTTPS <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4387" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4387/hovercard">#4387</a></li>
<li>Updated to a better trim() polyfill <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4072" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4072/hovercard">#4072</a></li>
<li>Updated types to allow specifying partial default headers on instance create <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4185" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4185/hovercard">#4185</a></li>
<li>Expanded isAxiosError types <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4344" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4344/hovercard">#4344</a></li>
<li>Updated type definition for axios instance methods <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4224" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4224/hovercard">#4224</a></li>
<li>Updated eslint config <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4722" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4722/hovercard">#4722</a></li>
<li>Updated Docs <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4742" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4742/hovercard">#4742</a></li>
<li>Refactored Axios to use ES2017 <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4787" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4787/hovercard">#4787</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Deprecated</h3><a id="user-content-deprecated" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Deprecated" href="#deprecated"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>There are multiple deprecations, refactors and fixes provided in this release. Please read through the full release notes to see how this may impact your project and use case.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Removed</h3><a id="user-content-removed" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Removed" href="#removed"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Removed incorrect argument for NetworkError constructor <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4656" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4656/hovercard">#4656</a></li>
<li>Removed Webpack <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4596" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4596/hovercard">#4596</a></li>
<li>Removed function that transform arguments to array <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4544" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4544/hovercard">#4544</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed</h3><a id="user-content-fixed-7" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed" href="#fixed-7"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Fixed grammar in README <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4649" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4649/hovercard">#4649</a></li>
<li>Fixed code error in README <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4599" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4599/hovercard">#4599</a></li>
<li>Optimized the code that checks cancellation <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4587" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4587/hovercard">#4587</a></li>
<li>Fix url pointing to defaults.js in README <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4532" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4532/hovercard">#4532</a></li>
<li>Use type alias instead of interface for AxiosPromise <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4505" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4505/hovercard">#4505</a></li>
<li>Fix some word spelling and lint style in code comments <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4500" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4500/hovercard">#4500</a></li>
<li>Edited readme with 3 updated browser icons of Chrome, FireFox and Safari <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4414" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4414/hovercard">#4414</a></li>
<li>Bump follow-redirects from 1.14.9 to 1.15.0 <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4673" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4673/hovercard">#4673</a></li>
<li>Fixing http tests to avoid hanging when assertions fail <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4435" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4435/hovercard">#4435</a></li>
<li>Fix TS definition for AxiosRequestTransformer <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4201" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4201/hovercard">#4201</a></li>
<li>Fix grammatical issues in README <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4232" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4232/hovercard">#4232</a></li>
<li>Fixing instance.defaults.headers type <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4557" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4557/hovercard">#4557</a></li>
<li>Fixed race condition on immediate requests cancellation <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4261" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4261/hovercard">#4261</a></li>
<li>Fixing Z_BUF_ERROR when no content <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4701" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4701/hovercard">#4701</a></li>
<li>Fixing proxy beforeRedirect regression <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4708" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4708/hovercard">#4708</a></li>
<li>Fixed AxiosError status code type <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4717" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4717/hovercard">#4717</a></li>
<li>Fixed AxiosError stack capturing <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4718" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4718/hovercard">#4718</a></li>
<li>Fixing AxiosRequestHeaders typings <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4334" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4334/hovercard">#4334</a></li>
<li>Fixed max body length defaults <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4731" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4731/hovercard">#4731</a></li>
<li>Fixed toFormData Blob issue on node&gt;v17 <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4728" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4728/hovercard">#4728</a></li>
<li>Bump grunt from 1.5.2 to 1.5.3 <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4743" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4743/hovercard">#4743</a></li>
<li>Fixing content-type header repeated <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4745" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4745/hovercard">#4745</a></li>
<li>Fixed timeout error message for http <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4738" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4738/hovercard">4738</a></li>
<li>Request ignores false, 0 and empty string as body values <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4785" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4785/hovercard">#4785</a></li>
<li>Added back missing minified builds <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4805" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4805/hovercard">#4805</a></li>
<li>Fixed a type error <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4815" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4815/hovercard">#4815</a></li>
<li>Fixed a regression bug with unsubscribing from cancel token; <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4819" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4819/hovercard">#4819</a></li>
<li>Remove repeated compression algorithm <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4820" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4820/hovercard">#4820</a></li>
<li>The error of calling extend to pass parameters <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4857" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4857/hovercard">#4857</a></li>
<li>SerializerOptions.indexes allows boolean | null | undefined <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4862" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4862/hovercard">#4862</a></li>
<li>Require interceptors to return values <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4874" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4874/hovercard">#4874</a></li>
<li>Removed unused imports <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4949" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4949/hovercard">#4949</a></li>
<li>Allow null indexes on formSerializer and paramsSerializer <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4960" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4960/hovercard">#4960</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Chores</h3><a id="user-content-chores-4" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Chores" href="#chores-4"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Set permissions for GitHub actions <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4765" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4765/hovercard">#4765</a></li>
<li>Included githubactions in the dependabot config <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4770" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4770/hovercard">#4770</a></li>
<li>Included dependency review <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4771" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4771/hovercard">#4771</a></li>
<li>Update security.md <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4784" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4784/hovercard">#4784</a></li>
<li>Remove unnecessary spaces <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4854" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4854/hovercard">#4854</a></li>
<li>Simplify the import path of AxiosError <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4875" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4875/hovercard">#4875</a></li>
<li>Fix Gitpod dead link <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4941" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4941/hovercard">#4941</a></li>
<li>Enable syntax highlighting for a code block <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4970" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4970/hovercard">#4970</a></li>
<li>Using Logo Axios in Readme.md <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4993" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4993/hovercard">#4993</a></li>
<li>Fix markup for note in README <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4825" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4825/hovercard">#4825</a></li>
<li>Fix typo and formatting, add colons <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4853" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4853/hovercard">#4853</a></li>
<li>Fix typo in readme <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios/pull/4942" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/axios/axios/pull/4942/hovercard">#4942</a></li>
</ul>

            <a data-analytics-event="{&quot;category&quot;:&quot;Footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;go to status&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;text:status&quot;}" href="https://www.githubstatus.com/" data-view-component="true" class="Link--secondary Link">Status</a>
          </li>

          <li class="mx-2">
            <a data-analytics-event="{&quot;category&quot;:&quot;Footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;go to community&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;text:community&quot;}" href="https://github.community/" data-view-component="true" class="Link--secondary Link">Community</a>
          </li>

          <li class="mx-2">
            <a data-analytics-event="{&quot;category&quot;:&quot;Footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;go to docs&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;text:docs&quot;}" href="https://docs.github.com/" data-view-component="true" class="Link--secondary Link">Docs</a>
          </li>

          <li class="mx-2">
            <a data-analytics-event="{&quot;category&quot;:&quot;Footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;go to contact&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;text:contact&quot;}" href="https://support.github.com?tags=dotcom-footer" data-view-component="true" class="Link--secondary Link">Contact</a>
          </li>

          <li class="mx-2" >
  <cookie-consent-link>
    <button
      type="button"
      class="Link--secondary underline-on-hover border-0 p-0 color-bg-transparent"
      data-action="click:cookie-consent-link#showConsentManagement"
      data-analytics-event="{&quot;location&quot;:&quot;footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;cookies&quot;,&quot;context&quot;:&quot;subfooter&quot;,&quot;tag&quot;:&quot;link&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;cookies_link_subfooter_footer&quot;}"
    >
       Manage cookies
    </button>
  </cookie-consent-link>
</li>

<li class="mx-2">
  <cookie-consent-link>
    <button
      type="button"
      class="Link--secondary underline-on-hover border-0 p-0 color-bg-transparent text-left"
      data-action="click:cookie-consent-link#showConsentManagement"
      data-analytics-event="{&quot;location&quot;:&quot;footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;dont_share_info&quot;,&quot;context&quot;:&quot;subfooter&quot;,&quot;tag&quot;:&quot;link&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;dont_share_info_link_subfooter_footer&quot;}"
    >
      Do not share my personal information
    </button>
  </cookie-consent-link>
</li>

      </ul>
    </nav>
  </div>
</footer>



    <ghcc-consent id="ghcc" class="position-fixed bottom-0 left-0" style="z-index: 999999"
      data-locale="en"
      data-initial-cookie-consent-allowed=""
      data-cookie-consent-required="false"
    ></ghcc-consent>




  <div id="ajax-error-message" class="ajax-error-message flash flash-error" hidden>
    <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-alert">
    <path d="M6.457 1.047c.659-1.234 2.427-1.234 3.086 0l6.082 11.378A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.082 15H1.918a1.75 1.75 0 0 1-1.543-2.575Zm1.763.707a.25.25 0 0 0-.44 0L1.698 13.132a.25.25 0 0 0 .22.368h12.164a.25.25 0 0 0 .22-.368Zm.53 3.996v2.5a.75.75 0 0 1-1.5 0v-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0ZM9 11a1 1 0 1 1-2 0 1 1 0 0 1 2 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    <button type="button" class="flash-close js-ajax-error-dismiss" aria-label="Dismiss error">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-x">
    <path d="M3.72 3.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0L8 6.94l3.22-3.22a.749.749 0 0 1 1.275.326.749.749 0 0 1-.215.734L9.06 8l3.22 3.22a.749.749 0 0 1-.326 1.275.749.749 0 0 1-.734-.215L8 9.06l-3.22 3.22a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042L6.94 8 3.72 4.78a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.06Z"></path>
</svg>
    </button>
    You can’t perform that action at this time.
  </div>

    <template id="site-details-dialog">
  <details class="details-reset details-overlay details-overlay-dark lh-default color-fg-default hx_rsm" open>
    <summary role="button" aria-label="Close dialog"></summary>
    <details-dialog class="Box Box--overlay d-flex flex-column anim-fade-in fast hx_rsm-dialog hx_rsm-modal">
      <button class="Box-btn-octicon m-0 btn-octicon position-absolute right-0 top-0" type="button" aria-label="Close dialog" data-close-dialog>
        <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-x">
    <path d="M3.72 3.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0L8 6.94l3.22-3.22a.749.749 0 0 1 1.275.326.749.749 0 0 1-.215.734L9.06 8l3.22 3.22a.749.749 0 0 1-.326 1.275.749.749 0 0 1-.734-.215L8 9.06l-3.22 3.22a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042L6.94 8 3.72 4.78a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.06Z"></path>
</svg>
      </button>
      <div class="octocat-spinner tmp-my-6 js-details-dialog-spinner"></div>
    </details-dialog>
  </details>
</template>

    <div class="Popover js-hovercard-content position-absolute" style="display: none; outline: none;">
  <div class="Popover-message Popover-message--bottom-left Popover-message--large Box color-shadow-large" style="width:360px;">
  </div>
</div>

    <template id="snippet-clipboard-copy-button">
  <div class="zeroclipboard-container position-absolute right-0 top-0">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon m-2 tmp-m-2">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>
</svg>
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none m-2 tmp-m-2">
    <path d="M13.78 4.22a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-7.25 7.25a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0L2.22 9.28a.751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018L6 10.94l6.72-6.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>
  </div>
</template>
<template id="snippet-clipboard-copy-button-unpositioned">
  <div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">

</svg>
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none">
    <path d="M13.78 4.22a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-7.25 7.25a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0L2.22 9.28a.751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018L6 10.94l6.72-6.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>
  </div>
</template>




    </div>
    <div id="js-global-screen-reader-notice" class="sr-only mt-n1" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true" ></div>
    <div id="js-global-screen-reader-notice-assertive" class="sr-only mt-n1" aria-live="assertive" aria-atomic="true"></div>
